phase1_phase2.description: r1-r11 cook runs → Phase 1 (23K PASS) + Phase 2 (23K PASS+FAIL)

phase3.description: r12-r18 cook runs → Phase 3 specialty data
phase3.cause: Cook restarts appended to same JSONL files instead of rotating output. Each restart re-generated pairs that already existed.
phase3.waste_assessment: 53K duplicate API calls at ~$0.003/pair = ~$159 wasted on dupes alone

cost_per_pair.note: Includes all waste, exploration, and duplicates

open_issues.duplicate_reconciliation: 53,007 dupes from r12-r18 needs root cause fix in cook script. SafeStore should check existing fingerprints before API call, not after.
open_issues.cook_restarts: Restarting cooks without rotating output dir appends to existing files. Must either: (a) rotate output dir per restart, or (b) dedup before writing.
